name: Detect job and company changes with Lusha bulk enrichment and HubSpot
description:
How it works
A daily schedule pulls your existing contacts from HubSpot
All contacts are bulk-enriched with Lusha in a single API call for efficiency
A code node compares current Lusha data against CRM records to detect job title or company changes
Changed contacts trigger a CRM update and a Slack alert to the assigned rep

Set up steps
Install the Lusha community node
Add your Lusha API, HubSpot, and Slack credentials
Adjust the CRM fetch limit based on your contact volume
Activate the workflow to run daily
